---
title: "Consider baseline covariate distribution"
author: "R.G. Thomas"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: "left=3cm,right=5cm,top=2cm,bottom=2cm"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    highlight: monochrome
    keep_tex: true
    includes:
      in_header: "~/shr/preamble.tex"
---
```{r include=F, echo=F}
# clear env: objects and packages
rm(list = ls())
options(
  knitr.kable.NA = "", dplyr.print_max = 1e9, knitr.table.format = "latex"
)
library(pacman)
p_load(janitor, kableExtra, tidyverse, knitr,  readxl)

opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE, fig.width = 3.2,
  fig.height = 3, results = "asis", dev = "pdf")
source("~/shr/zz.tools.R")
options(scipen = 1, digits = 2)
```
\bibliography{x17.bib}
\bibliographystyle{plain}
\nocite{*}
